name: Sweden and Finland
description:
After returning home, Sweden and Finland hear strange noises coming from their kitchen and investigate. Instead of finding the dog that they were expecting, they find a child.

The child doesn't seem like they have a home due to their messy clothing and old socks. They also stole a loaf of bread, so now Sweden has to search for the kid, and maybe Finland should be the one looking instead...
creator: SharkyBarky1234
